name: Black Magic Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease and flour two 9-inch round baking pans or one 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, stir together sugar, flour, cocoa, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
4. Add eggs, buttermilk, coffee, oil, and vanilla; beat on medium speed of an electric mixer for 2 minutes (batter will be thin).
5. For rectangular pan: Bake until golden brown and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Allow to cool for 10 minutes, then remove from pans and transfer to wire racks.
7. Cool completely.
8. Frost as desired.
- Serves: 10 to 12 servings
To make sour milk: Mix 1 tablespoon white vinegar with milk until the mixture equals 1 cup.
